rankings.reason: Best captures the futuristic, immersive, and sensory experience requested by the influencer persona through AR and AI integration.
Strong focus on efficiency and minimalist design, though it feels slightly more grounded than the truly futuristic Option B.
Provides a solid, practical vision of airport efficiency but lacks the creative, high-tech flair expected for the year 2050.
The reliance on scooters and moving floors feels dated and less innovative compared to the other futuristic concepts.
